title: Young Franky and Iceburg
description: Tom takes responsibility for the attack and protects Iceburg and Franky, even as the World Government tightens its trap.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Franky, Tom, Spandam, Blueno, Iceburg. Tom takes responsibility for the attack and protects Iceburg and Franky, even as the World Government tightens its trap.

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: The girls wouldn't let us in...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: What're you doing dressed like that?!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: You're usually the slow bar- tender

summary: Tom takes responsibility for the attack and protects Iceburg and Franky, even as the World Government tightens its trap.
